heading: Internship program
label: 7114 Internship program
text: The Secretary shall establish a competitive internship program of the Board for individuals enrolled in the first or second year of law schools accredited by the American Bar Association.
notes: Deadline for Establishing Internship Program, , , provided that:Pub. L. 118–196, § 5(c)138 Stat. 2673Dec. 23, 2024“The Secretary of Veterans Affairs shall establish the internship program required by section 7114 of such title [meaning title 38, United States Code], as added by subsection (a), not later than one year after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Dec. 23, 2024
